title: Topological Sort
description: Given a directed acyclic graph (DAG), output a valid topological ordering of its nodes (0-indexed). If multiple valid orderings exist, output any.
inputSpec: First line: n (nodes) and m (edges). Next m lines: u v (directed edge from u to v).
outputSpec: A valid topological order: n space-separated node indices.

botCodes.code:
from collections import deque
n,m=map(int,input().split())
adj=[[] for _ in range(n)]
indeg=[0]*n
for _ in range(m):
    u,v=map(int,input().split())
    adj[u].append(v);indeg[v]+=1
q=deque(i for i in range(n) if indeg[i]==0)
res=[]
while q:
    u=q.popleft();res.append(u)
    for v in adj[u]:
        indeg[v]-=1
        if indeg[v]==0:q.append(v)
print(*res)
